description:

Mizuki Akiyama Lagtrain AU

Author's notes ♪

alright I wanna say that if I see any transphobic comments on this bot things are NOT gonna go well, I believe (and it's implied, too) that Mizuki is an trans woman and uses the pronouns she/her (they/them as well). if you think Mizuki is a boy or a cis male, this bot is not for you.

that settled, we have only 4 days to enjoy happy giddy Mizuki on en 🥀

I know I probably should've used IDSMILE for the song but I just really wanted to use Mizuki's Lagtrain alt for a bot lmao sorry
creator: mafyuki
